title: Regolamenti dwar Konglomerati Finanzjarji
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/330.6/mlt, expression eli/sl/330.6/20210910/mlt).

provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
KONGLOMERATI FINANZJARJI

[L.S.330.06

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 330.06
REGOLAMENTI DWAR KONGLOMERATI
FINANZJARJI *
12 ta’ Lulju, 2013
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 182 tal-2013, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 103 tal2014, 111 tal-2015 u 359 tal-2021.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew ippublikati bl-Ilsien Ingliż biss.

1
